allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S MARUTI-004 -d blog -U sa -P mssadmin -f 65001 -Q "SELECT TOP 3 Slug, LEFT\(Html, 200\) AS HtmlSample FROM Posts WHERE Status = 'Draft' ORDER BY CreatedAt")

Bash(sqlcmd -S MARUTI-004 -d blog -U sa -P mssadmin -f 65001 -Q "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS StillCorrupted FROM Posts WHERE Html LIKE N'%' + NCHAR\(226\)+NCHAR\(8364\)+NCHAR\(8221\) + N'%' OR Html LIKE N'%' + NCHAR\(226\)+NCHAR\(8364\)+NCHAR\(8482\) + N'%' OR Plaintext LIKE N'%' + NCHAR\(226\)+NCHAR\(8364\)+NCHAR\(8221\) + N'%' OR FaqJson LIKE N'%' + NCHAR\(226\)+NCHAR\(8364\)+NCHAR\(8221\) + N'%'")
Bash(sqlcmd -S MARUTI-004 -d blog -U sa -P mssadmin -f 65001 -Q "SELECT Slug, Status, ScheduledAt, PublishedAt FROM Posts WHERE Status = 'Draft' ORDER BY ScheduledAt")
